film.title: Elena Undone
film.overview: The wife of a pastor who preaches against homosexuality embarks on an affair with a female writer.

dialogues.dialogue: and liberal judges ruling willy nilly in their favor.  We are not going to stand by and allow it, Mrs. Winters.  Shame on you.  Shame on you for undermining your husband's work.  But more importantly - God's work.
